description: User can create an account using email and password.
Registration form must include fields: first name, last name, username, phone number, email, password, and confirm password.
System shall require email verification before first login.
System shall provide meaningful inline error messages for invalid inputs.
Password must be between 8 and 12 characters in length.
Password must contain at least one number, one special character, and one alphabet character.
Account is not considered active until email is verified.
Email format must be valid (exact regex not specified).
Password must meet complexity requirements (8-12 chars, include number, special, alphabet).
Required fields (first name, last name, username, phone number, email, password, confirm password) cannot be empty.
Duplicate email address must be detected and rejected with a meaningful error.
